dataset: Health Canada Vaping Product Reporting Regulations (VPRR) sales
reporting_basis: Manufacturers and importers report shipments to wholesalers or retailers twice a year under the Vaping Product Reporting Regulations; consumer till sales and consumption are not measured.
categories: Vaping part that contains a vaping substance
Vaping device that contains a vaping substance
Vaping part or device that does not contain a vaping substance
quality_and_limitations: Health Canada states data may be revised after re-submissions or audits.
Some data are suppressed or merged where few companies operate.
Totals are shipment destination province/territory, not final consumer purchase location.
